title: green apple‎
description: this pack changes the red apple to a green apple
body:
# what this changes🍏🍎🍏🍎
this pack changes the [red apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/576503a35e2c0ca680cf9416fbcc87869219e8d3.png) texture to a [green apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef73f21201e0a6d4fdfc2ccb5aa3ca764bce6a30.webp)

and also changes the name from "Apple" to "Green Apple"


cheak out other cool packs: https://modrinth.com/user/RandomBro
